items.title:
[负面] Few things to say about this game :

I think the e...
items.summary:
Few things to say about this game :

I think the elephant in the room is the Chat GPT translations. Like, it's functional enough to tell you the character skills , the game play, and give you a basic idea of what's happening in the story, but it's still pretty wonky and it leads to some UI and type spacing issues.
Story - Fairly standard Chinese gacha story where you're part of some mysterious organisation fighting an apocalyptic tier disaster . Pretty generic 
The in-game combat sprites and animations aren't anything notable, they're still serviceable, and the character art and designs themselves are insanely good, striking a good balance between Lovecraftian Body Horror and pretty anime people.
The music is surprisingly decent, and sets the atmosphere well enough.
Pay to win on every corner in form of battle passes + standard top up range $1-$99 of special currency . Offers on every corner for you to spend money ( I know they are optional ) and yet strong emphasis on pay to win concept .
Chines game - Japanese voice over ? make sense , right ?
Grind is on extreme level as there is no auto battle , so you need to re-do everything by your self , it may not appear as something to worry about , however that makes this game so boring if you will have to do 200+ battles a day to get anywhere .
Devs behaviour on discord are just a joke if you have a different opinion then devs you will get auto kicked from servers . Same goes for Chines chat QQ 
Very low chance to get good champions like SSR or even SR , after 158 summons did not get one , ( all the codes + rewards in game ) .



I will not recommend this Chines mess to anyone .
